title: AI saved me 15 hours a week. Here's exactly how
post:
I tracked my time for three months before integrating AI into my workflow. Then I tracked it again after. The results genuinely surprised me.

The biggest wins: AI handles my first drafts for reports and emails — I write about 40% of the words now instead of 100%. It summarizes long documents in minutes instead of hours. And it helps me debug code when I'm stuck at 11 PM. Those three things alone saved me roughly 15 hours a week that I now spend with my family or on strategic work that actually moves the needle.

If you're not tracking your time with and without AI, you're guessing. Try it for a week. The numbers might shock you.

How many hours do you think AI saves you each week? Have you actually measured it? Thoughts?
